summary: Completed comprehensive P0/P1 feature testing. Fixed critical bug in Customer create API (missing created_at field). All 20 backend tests pass. All frontend pages verified - Barcode Scanner Modal, Customers page with tabs, Doctors CRUD, and Reports page with all report types working.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (width/height -1) - non-blocking, charts still render

backend: P0: Barcode lookup /api/products/barcode/{barcode} - returns found:false for non-existent barcode
P0: Barcode lookup endpoint accessible with auth
P0: Product search /api/products/search-with-batches - includes barcode in search
P1: DELETE /api/customers/{id} - Delete customer with verification
P1: GET /api/reports/low-stock - Low stock report with summary
P1: GET /api/reports/expiry - Expiry report with default 30 days
P1: GET /api/reports/expiry?days=60 - Expiry report with custom days
frontend: Dashboard loads with charts and data
Customers table displays with CRUD actions (View/Edit/Delete)
Add Customer dialog opens with all fields (Name, Phone, Email, Customer Type, Address, GSTIN, Credit Limit)
Doctors table displays with Edit/Delete actions
Add Doctor dialog opens with all fields (Name, Contact, Specialization, Clinic Address)
Reports page with 4 report type cards
Sales Report with date range filter
Low Stock Report displays with Current Stock, Reorder Level, Shortage, Status columns
Expiry Report displays with Product, Batch, Stock, Expiry Date, Days Left, Value columns
Barcode Scanner Modal with Camera/Manual Entry modes
New Sale page with Scan Barcode button

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Customer model was missing fields (email, address, customer_type, gstin, credit_limit, notes, created_at) - now complete
Fixed: CustomerCreate model updated to include all fields
Fixed: Doctor model added clinic_address and notes fields
Fixed: DoctorCreate model updated to include clinic_address and notes fields
All models now properly serialize datetime fields to ISO format for MongoDB storage
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - lines 725-735 (Customer model), lines 843-860 (CustomerCreate, Doctor, DoctorCreate models)
seed_data_creation: Test customers and doctors created during testing (prefixed with TEST_) - auto-cleaned
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0/P1 features fully tested and working. Key changes: 1) Customer and Doctor models updated with all required fields for frontend forms, 2) Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_p0_p1_features.py cover all CRUD operations and reports, 3) Barcode Scanner Modal has Camera Scan and Manual Entry modes both working, 4) Reports page has Sales, Low Stock, Expiry, and Stock Report cards with proper data display. Test credentials: testadmin@pharmacy.com/admin123
